variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12212 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12212 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12212 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25855 Air Filter Filter - Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12212
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25855 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
